ancestry_modifiers: Ancestry-specific baseline burden can change observed effect sizes.
biological_mechanism: Chronic stress increases HPA-axis and inflammatory activity that interacts with genomic vulnerability.
definition: Psychosocial Stress is curated as a population-level modifier in GENARCH for educational gene-environment interpretation across disease models.
name: Psychosocial Stress

proxies.measurement_method: Standardized z-score from harmonized public indicators
proxies.name: Psychosocial Stress composite index

references.title: GENARCH curated synthesis for Psychosocial Stress

sensitive_windows.mechanism_rationale: Adolescent and chronic adulthood stress trajectories.

systems_affected.mechanism_summary: Chronic stress increases HPA-axis and inflammatory activity that interacts with genomic vulnerability.

temporal_sensitivity: Adolescent and chronic adulthood stress trajectories.
